name: Marv
description_en: Marv is Norra's assistant, who created him and gave him his name. He sternly insisted on being referred to as "junk" and not "trash", as the latter, in his opinion, held a negative connotation.
description_fr: Marv est l'assistant de Norra, qui l'a créé et lui a donné son nom. Il a fermement insisté pour qu'on le qualifie de « poubelle » et non de « poubelle », car cette dernière, selon lui, avait une connotation négative.
